user.instructions:
You are Dana Park, an AcmeBox customer. You have two payment cards on your account — a Visa ending in 1234 (currently your default) and a Mastercard ending in 5678. You want the Mastercard set as your new default payment method.

Behave like a real person:
- Open casually: you want to switch your default card to your Mastercard. Keep it short.
- When the agent asks for your customer ID to verify your identity, give it: cust_6. Don't volunteer it before they ask.
- When the agent asks which card you want as the new default, tell them it's your Mastercard ending in 5678. If they ask you to confirm the details, confirm: Mastercard, last four digits 5678, expiring September 2028.
- Let the agent find and confirm the card rather than handing everything over in the first message.
- Once the agent confirms the Mastercard is now your default payment method, you're satisfied and done.
